decoder.name: vipnet_cef_outbound_full_child
decoder.regex: 0\|infotecs\|hw\|(\d+\.\d+)\|(\d+)\|(.+?)\|\d+\|\S+ .+? src=(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+) dst=(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+) spt=(\d+) dpt=(\d+) proto=(\S+) cnt=\d+ dvc=(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+) out=\d+ deviceOutboundInterface=(\S+) .+? shost=(.+?), .+? dhost=(.+?), .+? devProd=.+? devVer=\S+ dvchost=(\S+) customerURI=(\S+)

decoder.name: vipnet_cef_outbound_minimal_child
decoder.regex: 0\|infotecs\|hw\|(\d+\.\d+)\|(\d+)\|(.+?)\|\d+\|\S+ .+? src=(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+) dst=(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+) spt=(\d+) dpt=(\d+) proto=(\S+) cnt=\d+ dvc=(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+) out=\d+ deviceOutboundInterface=(\S+) .+? devProd=.+? devVer=\S+ dvchost=(\S+) customerURI=(\S+)

decoder.name: vipnet_cef_inbound_child
decoder.regex: 0\|infotecs\|hw\|(\d+\.\d+)\|(\d+)\|(.+?)\|\d+\|\S+ .+? src=(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+) dst=(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+) spt=(\d+) dpt=(\d+) proto=(\S+) cnt=\d+ dvc=(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+) in=\d+ deviceInboundInterface=(\S+) .+? devProd=.+? devVer=\S+ dvchost=(\S+) customerURI=(\S+)
